{{Quote|Something in her has gone terribly wrong.|[[Tholme/Legends|Tholme]]|<ref name="Jedi: Count Dooku" />}}
'''Kadrian Sey''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who recently served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] before she fell to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] and joined the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], becoming one of [[Count of Serenno/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku's]] [[Dark Acolyte/Legends|Dark Acolytes]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Sey was [[Death/Legends|killed]] at the hands of [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] on [[Kiffu/Legends|Kiffu]].

==Biography==
[[File:KadrianSey-tattoos.jpg|thumb|left|120px|Kadrian Sey's facial tattoos.]]
Discovered to be [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] at an early age, Kadrian Sey was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple's]] [[Jedi academy|academy]] to become strong in [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. Constructing a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] for herself and adopting the traditional facial [[Tattoo/Legends|tattoos]] of her [[Species/Legends|species]], the [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]], Sey was selected by a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] for further training. After completing her apprenticeship as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], Sey was elevated to the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] and assigned long-term missions in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] by the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]]. As a result, she was abroad during much of the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]] which engulfed the Republic in the years leading up to the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|first battle of Geonosis]] and the beginning of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="Jedi: Count Dooku" />

When the High Council recalled all [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and ordered them to take up military positions in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]], Sey defied their summons, never returning to Coruscant. Abandoning her Jedi heritage, the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Dooku/Legends|Darth Tyranus]] corrupted Sey to the dark side and invited her to join him as a [[Dark Acolyte/Legends|Dark Acolyte]]. Part of Tyranus' personal guard, Sey crafted for herself a [[Synthetic lightsaber crystal/Legends|red-bladed]] lightsaber, which she wielded well beside fellow acolyte [[Tol Skorr]].<ref name="Jedi: Count Dooku" />

Tyranus, under his alter ego [[Count of Serenno/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]], leader of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy]], led Sey, Skorr, [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]], and [[Sora Bulq/Legends|Sora Bulq]] on a diplomatic mission to liberate [[Tibrin/Legends|Tibrin]]. Marching into the royal palace, the group confronted the planetary ruler, [[Suribran Tu]], who quickly offered to betray the Republic and join Dooku's cause. The elderly Sith Lord asked his compatriots what their course of action should be: Sey arguing in favor of accepting the offer, reasoning that it would provide for continuity of government and allow for a smoother transition to the Confederacy. Fellow acolyte Vos immediately countered by stating that since Tu was a hated butcher, leaving him in power would only convince people that the Confederacy was no better than the Republic. Dooku opted for Vos' argument and [[Sai cha/Legends|beheaded]] Tu without further discussion.<ref name="Jedi: Count Dooku" />

[[File:KadrianSeyDeath.jpg|thumb|left|300px|Sey's death at the hands of Quinlan Vos.]]
Sey also accompanied Dooku to [[Kiffu/Legends|Kiffu]], where the Count was meeting with [[Sheyf]] [[Tinté Vos]], along with Tol Skorr and Quinlan Vos. When the negotiations turned sour, Dooku ordered the acolytes present to [[Assassin/Legends|assassinate]] the Sheyf and kill her [[Bodyguard/Legends|guard]]. At this moment, Vos revealed his identity as a Republic [[Agent/Legends|agent]], [[Raid on Kiffu|engaging]] Sey with his lightsaber and [[Sai tok/Legends|bisecting]] her at the waist in order to protect the legitimate leader of the [[Planet/Legends|world]].<ref name="Jedi: Count Dooku" />
